parsed.availability_comment: No adverse availability news found in current search set as of March 23, 2026.
parsed.availability_note: No current injury/suspension report found; available for most of league phase if squad status holds.
parsed.followup_reason: Need actual CSK matchday XI data from March 30, 2026 onward to upgrade from likely to guaranteed.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Overseas-slot pressure exists, though retained spinner role looks stronger than several alternative combinations.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competition remains real with Brevis, Overton, Henry, Short, Hosein and others, but Noor’s specialist spin role is one of CSK’s cleaner overseas fits.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained frontline wrist-spinner; strong CSK fit, but overseas combination still keeps him just below guaranteed.

- Every source URL array must contain at least one URL.
